mods.name: Default
mods.start_cmd_linux: ./run.sh +set dedicated 1 +set ip {ip} +set port {port} +set hostname "{hostname}" +set maxclients {maxplayers} +set game {game} +set timelimit {timelimit} +set fraglimit {fraglimit} +set rcon_password "{rcon_password}" +map {map}

mods.name: ioquake3
mods.start_cmd_linux: ./ioq3ded.x86_64 +set dedicated 2  +set net_ip {ip}  +set net_port {port}  +set sv_hostname "{hostname}"  +set sv_maxclients {maxplayers}  +set g_gametype 0  +set fraglimit {fraglimit}  +set timelimit {timelimit}  +set rconpassword "{rcon_password}"  +map {map}
mods.start_cmd_windows: ioq3ded.x86_64.exe +set dedicated 1  +set net_ip {ip}  +set net_port {port}  +set sv_hostname "{hostname}"  +set sv_maxclients {maxplayers}  +set g_gametype 0  +set fraglimit {fraglimit}  +set timelimit {timelimit}  +set rconpassword "{rcon_password}"  +map {map}

mods.name: quake3e
mods.start_cmd_linux: ./run.sh +set dedicated 2  +set net_ip {ip}  +set net_port {port}  +set sv_hostname "{hostname}"  +set sv_maxclients {maxplayers}  +set g_gametype 0  +set fraglimit {fraglimit}  +set timelimit {timelimit}  +set rconpassword "{rcon_password}"  +map {map}
mods.start_cmd_windows: quake3e.ded.x64.exe +set dedicated 2  +set net_ip {ip}  +set net_port {port}  +set sv_hostname "{hostname}"  +set sv_maxclients {maxplayers}  +set g_gametype 0  +set fraglimit {fraglimit}  +set timelimit {timelimit}  +set rconpassword "{rcon_password}"  +map {map}
